full_set.title: Complete the full Celestial Netherite armor set — Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots

enchant_set.title: Fully enchant the Celestial Netherite armor set — all 4 pieces at their maximum enchantment

subtitle.text: Three ores. One chain. The highest-tier armor in the pack. Fully enchanted. This is the final armor upgrade.

description: CH.16 · THE CELESTIAL SET
▸ Celestial Netherite is the final armor tier.
It exceeds Netherite base stats.
It enchants to a higher ceiling.
The three-input chain (Lunar + Zephyr + Solar) produces
Celestial Netherite Ingots, which upgrade Netherite gear
in the same way Netherite upgrades Diamond.
The full set fully enchanted is Ch16's culmination.
◈ CELESTISYNTH FORGE CHAIN
└ Step 1: Refine Lunar Stone → Lunar Ingot (smelting)
└ Step 2: Process Zephyr Deposit → Zephyr Ingot
(may require specialized forge block — check JEI: celestisynth:)
└ Step 3: Cut Solar Crystal → Solar Shard
(Nether origin — may require heat processing)
└ Step 4: Combine 3 ingots/shards → Celestial Netherite Ingot
(alloy process — Smithing Table or Celestisynth Forge)
└ Step 5: Celestial Netherite Ingot + Netherite Armor → Upgrade
(Smithing Template may be required — check JEI)
◈ ENCHANTMENT PRIORITY FOR CELESTIAL SET
└ Helmet: Aqua Affinity, Respiration III, Protection IV
└ Chestplate: Protection IV, Unbreaking III, Mending
└ Leggings: Protection IV, Swift Sneak III (for dungeon movement)
└ Boots: Depth Strider III, Feather Falling IV, Protection IV
└ Global: Mending on all 4 pieces if possible
(Mending on Celestial Netherite = effectively unbreakable)
◈ IMMERSIVE ENCHANTING ADVANTAGE
└ Immersive Enchanting: no RNG — choose exact enchantments
(uses Ancient Books + material costs instead of level gambling)
└ Source: Ancient Books from Chiseled Bookshelves in structures
(Ancient Cities, Bastions, End Cities)
└ Enchant the full set through Immersive Enchanting for predictable results
▸ Netherite was the hardest material.
Then three rocks fell from space.
The chain that combines them is Celestial Netherite.
The armor that comes from it is what the endgame body wears.
Ch17 bosses require it.
Ch17 will not wait for you to finish farming.
Finish now.
▶ Complete the full Celestial Netherite armor set [check]
▶ Fully enchant all 4 pieces [check]
◇ Celestial Netherite tools: companion quest below.
The armor is the body. The tools are the hand.
Both are required for Ch17 readiness.
Finish armor first. Then tools.
